title: Gremxolotl
description: A Resource pack that replaces Axolotls with Grems from Gigi Murin of Hololive English
body:
This Resource Pack adds **Gremxolotls** in the game!!
(It replaces the default model of Axolotls to Grems)

Version 2.0 requires [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) mods for custom grem models (Optional)

## Custom Grem Model names:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Grem
- Jess
- doggrem
- Zephyr

</details>



(Name your Grem "Grumm" or "dinnerbone" to scratch its bellyyyyy)
